variants: Rihaan Triplett is a prominent figure in the field of fire protection engineering, where he has made significant contributions. He is the author of the book titled Kelpie Node Expansion, which explores innovative techniques in his area of expertise. Throughout his career, Rihaan has been recognized for his exceptional work and was honored with the Cliffspire Laurel. Additionally, he is an active member of the Copperleaf Soapmakers Guild, where he engages with fellow enthusiasts in this unique hobby. His doctoral advisor and mentor, Olawale Feyisetan, played a pivotal role in shaping his academic and professional journey.
